uplink.description: Full periodic reading: battery, vaping index, PM1.0/PM2.5/PM10, temperature, humidity, TVOC, tamper/buzzer/occupancy status (covers climate requires)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; bytes hand-built LE per the Milesight command-id TLV, expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (ORACLE) and re-shaped into the normalized vocabulary. Negative temp & alarm-value frames covered by the next vector.

uplink.description: Negative temperature plus alarm-trigger value frames (vaping index alarm and temperature alarm both carry an overriding reading)
uplink._note: Synthetic: 0x09 sets temperature to -5.2C, then a 0x0a alarm-trigger (type 0x11) value frame overrides it to 41.2C exactly as upstream does. Expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (ORACLE) and normalized.

uplink.description: TTN upstream example: vaping index, PM, temperature over-range alarm (no value), humidity, TVOC, tamper/buzzer normal
uplink._note: Input is the upstream TTN example verbatim; expected.data is the upstream decode (vaping_index 0, pm 2/2/2, temperature_alarm 'over range error' with no value, humidity 57.9, tvoc 48, tamper/buzzer normal) re-shaped into the normalized vocabulary. The over-range alarm carries no temperature reading, so this vector alone does not satisfy the climate temperature requirement (covered by the synthetic vectors).

uplink.description: Unknown command id aborts the walk with an error (mirrors the upstream throw)
